title: 🔥周期盈利加速出清，MVRV远逊上轮同期
body: 市场正处于深熊级别的价值出清阶段。核心在于MVRV跌至1.22，远低于上轮周期同期的1.69（2022-04）。该指标当前已低于历史80%的时间，且AHR999（0.41）触及2022年中期水平的抄底区，说明本轮周期的链上盈利能力正被加速压缩。价格偏离200日定投成本达-27.5%，长期筹码承受着严酷的账面浮亏。综合判断：偏空。这种周期加速赶底的极限施压还会持续多久？
title_en: 🔥 Accelerated Cycle Profit Flush: MVRV Severely Lagging Previous Cycle
body_en: The market is currently enduring a deep bear-style value flushout. The core signal? MVRV has plunged to 1.22, severely lagging the 1.69 read at this exact stage last cycle (April 2022). This metric is now lower than 80% of its historical timeframe. Add to that the AHR999 index dropping to 0.41—hitting a macro buy-the-dip zone last seen in mid-2022—and it's clear that on-chain profitability this cycle is being aggressively squeezed. Price is currently trading -27.5% below the 200-day DCA cost basis, meaning long-term holders are bleeding with severe unrealized losses. Verdict: Bearish bias. The big question is, how much longer can the market sustain this extreme pressure of an accelerated cycle capitulation?
